query:
UPDATE canciones c
               SET total_samplea = (
                        SELECT COUNT(*)::int
                        FROM relaciones_sample r
                        WHERE r.cancion_destino_id = c.id
                          AND r.tipo_relacion = 'sample'
                   ),
                   total_sampleada = (
                        SELECT COUNT(*)::int
                        FROM relaciones_sample r
                        WHERE r.cancion_fuente_id = c.id
                          AND r.tipo_relacion = 'sample'
                   ),
                   updated_at = NOW()
               WHERE c.id = ANY($1)
